doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the official EEOC Compliance Manual covers Retaliation, not Age Discrimination, and the provided text uses a non-existent section structure and effective date.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The official EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 covers "Retaliation," while age discrimination is primarily addressed in Section 2 (Threshold Issues) and various specific guidance documents, not a "Section 8: Age Discrimination" effective 2018.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: Section 8 of the official EEOC Compliance Manual covers Retaliation, not Age Discrimination, and the provided text uses a non-existent section structure and effective date.
